summary: Adds a portable proposal validator for control-plane mutators that requires a coherent drift-plan-apply-clean-repeat lifecycle, canonical write paths, typed input failure, expected-input and plan binding, exact write-set closure, protected-scope preservation, zero-write convergence, stale-plan rejection, and failure-atomic rollback; clarifies producer-verifier contract binding, external evidence birth/publication separation, and authority/fallback/corroboration semantics as project-owned gaps pending a future schema; no v3 ledger integration, compatibility reader, or schema change is introduced.
